Chanel: A woman's perfume with the scent of a woman. Chanel No. 5 is the very essence of femininity. A timeless, legendary fragrance that belongs to the world. It is the ultimate olfactory masterpiece, an institution of luxury that has defined an era and been chosen by icons. Experience the absolute prestige of the House of Chanel.
Hermes: The earth speaks to us. Terre d'Hermès is a symbolic narrative exploring raw matter and its metamorphosis. A novel that expresses the alchemical power of the elements. An eau between earth and sky. A journey imbued with strength and poetry, revealing the intimate connection between man and his origins.
YSL: Dare to be bold. YSL Libre is the fragrance of freedom, designed for those who live by their own rules. Break the chains. It is the ultimate statement of empowerment and boundary-pushing defiance. A grand, monumental tribute to the modern rebel who reigns supreme over their own life.
Maison Margiela: The scent of a memory. Close your eyes and let the fragrance transport you to the memory of a jazz club in Brooklyn, the lingering scent of a lazy Sunday morning, or the warmth of a fireplace in Chamonix. Your memory, bottled. Each scent instantly evokes personal impressions and positive emotions that echo your own personal history.
Jean Paul Gaultier: Welcome to the spectacular world of Gaultier. Le Mâle is the iconic sailor, a legendary figure of temptation and power. He is the muse of the house, a shared cultural obsession. Witness the ultimate spectacle of seduction. Surrender to the undeniable authority of the corset and the tin can.
Viktor & Rolf: An olfactory explosion. Flowerbomb is an audacious, maximalist declaration of intent. We invite you into a theatrical universe where everything is amplified. The ultimate weapon of glamour. A monumental, avant-garde fantasy that leaves a permanent, undeniable trail on the world.
Mancera: The absolute pinnacle of niche perfumery. Mancera transcends the ordinary, utilizing only the most exclusive, rare, and potent ingredients. An elite fusion of Western mastery and Eastern opulence. The ultimate signature of prestige, crafted for the initiated who demand unrivaled performance and undeniable authority.
Creed: A legacy of unrivaled scents. The House of Creed is an authentic, luxury perfume house dedicated to the creation of highly original, artisan fragrances. Commissioned and worn by kings, queens and discerning fragrance connoisseurs throughout history. Masterpieces of infusion, reigning supreme for over 250 years.
Byredo: I wanted to capture the smell of ink on paper, the feeling of a fading memory. Mojave Ghost is a transparent, fleshy exploration of survival in the wilderness. It lives on the skin, quiet and resilient. A secret shared between the wearer and the elements. Unfiltered, stripped back, and deeply personal.
VARO: For the person you are when no one is watching. The scent of a secret you almost forgot. VARŌ doesn’t announce you to the room; it whispers to your own skin. Raw, unfiltered, and intimately yours. It is the smell of a rain-soaked street corner that only you remember. A confession wrapped in amber glass.
